description: Use this API to return complex system-wide values. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, cmpval = systot(string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the system total desired. (input).

string.description: Total system losses; I**2 * (R + jX) for ac branches.
Total power consumed by transformer magnetizing admittances.
Total of FACTS device shunt elements.
Total of bus fixed and switched shunt elements.
Total of line shunts and transformer magnetizing shunt elements.
Total of FACTS device fixed switched line and transformer magnetizing shunt elements.

error_codes.description: No in-service buses in case; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
